title: Custom god tools craft
description: God Tools crafting datapack to get op
body:
only work in forge and Neoforge<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0HsRjSeSYiE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
this datapack allow to craft God stuff
![the main craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/459890c9a576338d0741efd3eafeb0afcbb31020.png)
just change the tools / armor in the middle, to get an easy and quick way to get them type the command /function god:god_stuff 
that give all the craftable stuff to the player

work only on forge and neoforge, I'm not sure for fabric and quilt
